qualification.summary: Displayed values did not meet the tester's required sizing and readability constraints, preventing usable operation of the proposed self-service environment.
qualification.remediation_condition: The display must support the tester's required sizing and readability before architectural testing can proceed.

reciprocal_scope.reason_recorded: TA-14 described evaluation and reciprocal review as separate services requiring separate scope rather than participation in the proposed reciprocal model.

limitations: This result concerns environment qualification, not TA-14 architectural capability.
The result does not establish parentage, containment, completeness, superiority, or failure of the underlying framework.
The declined reciprocal scope is recorded separately from Playground access.
